title: Shakeout jog
coachNotes: Light shakeout, not a rest day swap for load. Tue overshot to 51 vs 40 planned (RPE 4, brief Z4 on strides) even though HRV/RHR/sleep were all strong. Keep this strictly Z1, flat ground, stop early if legs feel heavy. Thu's uphill tempo is the priority, don't dig into that reserve today.
